src: Python SDK for interacting with the Moorcheh Semantic Search API v1. Moorcheh provides ultra-fast, highly accurate vector similarity search and analysis capabilities based on information-theoretic principles.
ja: Moorcheh Semantic Search API v1と連携するためのPython SDK。MoorchehはRe情報理論に基づく超高速・高精度なベクトル類似度検索・分析機能を提供します。
